why_it_matters: Mirror-only files can be unauthorized reuploads

check_item: License evidence is visible on source or bundled license file
why_it_matters: A generic 'free' label is not enough for shipping decisions

check_item: Creator/foundry name matches font metadata or license text
why_it_matters: Mismatched names can signal a bad mirror or repackaged file

check_item: Commercial-use signal is explicit enough for the project
why_it_matters: Personal-use-only fonts can appear on free font sites

check_item: Embedding or app/game use is not contradicted by terms
why_it_matters: Some font terms distinguish desktop, web, app, and embedding use
Shipping project files or asset packs can redistribute raw font files
Some licenses require preserving notice files during redistribution

check_item: Modified fonts are checked for reserved-name rules
why_it_matters: OFL and custom licenses can restrict derivative font names

check_item: Logo/title-screen use has separate review status
why_it_matters: Font license permission is not trademark or brand clearance

check_item: Final source re-check is dated near release
why_it_matters: Pages, files, and terms can change between prototype and shipping
